ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., core 0 cpu_idle) */,
  "component_type" INTEGER /* Type of component (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "component_model" TEXT /* Model or specific version of the component */,
  "component_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type FOREIGN KEY ("component_type") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that generated the event */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the event in seconds */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the event in seconds */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the event (e.g., start, end) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., application, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that generated the energy consumption data */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption in Joules */,
  "energy_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of energy consumption (e.g., Joules, Watts) */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption in Watts */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage level */,
  "current" REAL /* Current level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_energy_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that generated the timestamp data */,
  "timestamp_start" REAL /* Start timestamp of the event */,
  "timestamp_end" REAL /* End timestamp of the event */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the timestamp */,
  "timestamp_type" TEXT /* Type of the timestamp (e.g., start, end, intermediate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timestamps_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., office, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component type (e.g., processor, storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., start, end) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., system, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy unit (e.g., Joules, Watts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., Joules) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
